message: 🌱 Add kubeflow: API calls on centraldashboard become slow with a large mission (#641)

files.patch:
@@ -0,0 +1,79 @@
+{
+  "version": "kc-mission-v1",
+  "name": "kubeflow-5190-api-calls-on-centraldashboard-become-slow-with-a-large-number-of-p",
+  "missionClass": "solution",
+  "author": "KubeStellar Bot",
+  "authorGithub": "kubestellar",
+  "mission": {
+    "title": "kubeflow: API calls on centraldashboard become slow with a large number of profiles",
+    "description": "API calls on centraldashboard become slow with a large number of profiles. This issue affects 5+ users.",
+    "type": "troubleshoot",
+    "status": "completed",
+    "steps": [
+      {
+        "title": "Identify kubeflow troubleshoot symptoms",
+        "description": "Check for the issue in your kubeflow deployment:\n```bash\nkubectl get pods -n kubeflow -l app.kubernetes.io/name=kubeflow\nkubectl logs -l app.kubernetes.io/name=kubeflow -n kubeflow --tail=100 | grep -i error\n```\nLook for errors or warnings in the logs that may indicate the issue."
+      },
+      {
+        "title": "Review kubeflow configuration",
+        "description": "Inspect the relevant kubeflow configuration:\n```bash\nkubectl get all -n kubeflow -l app.kubernetes.io/name=kubeflow\nkubectl get configmap -n kubeflow -l app.kubernetes.io/part-of=kubeflow\n```\n**What steps did you take and what happened:**\n[A clear and concise description of what the bug is.]\n\nWe started seeing some slow startup time when a user loads the Kubeflow dashboard, and after some tracing tracked down a slow call to"
+      },
+      {
+        "title": "Apply the fix for API calls on centraldashboard become slow with a large",
+        "description": "To solve https://github.com/kubeflow/kubeflow/issues/5190\n\nFound most of the issue to occur when listing the rolebindings when there are many namespaces as it does a loop. Query the shared index to list and get the rolebindings.\n\n* Note: first commit and if there are procedures I am missing, please\n```yaml\nGET /kfam/v1/bindings?user=$USER ReadBinding 6.064392368s\n```"
+      },
+      {
+        "title": "Confirm API calls on centraldashboard become slow with a is resolved",
+        "description": "Verify the fix by checking that the original error no longer occurs:\n```bash\nkubectl logs -l app.kubernetes.io/name=kubeflow -n kubeflow --tail=50 --since=5m\nkubectl get events -n kubeflow --sort-by='.lastTimestamp' | tail -10\n```\nConfirm that the issue symptoms are gone."
+      }
+    ],
+    "resolution": {
+      "summary": "To solve https://github.com/kubeflow/kubeflow/issues/5190\n\nFound most of the issue to occur when listing the rolebindings when there are many namespaces as it does a loop. Query the shared index to list and get the rolebindings.\n\n* Note: first commit and if there are procedures I am missing, please let me know.",
+      "codeSnippets": [
+        "GET /kfam/v1/bindings?user=$USER ReadBinding 6.064392368s"
+      ]
+    }
+  },
